violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. CFSM associated with this establishment no longer is employed with them.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors underneath the racking in the walk-in cooler and freezer needs to be cleaned more thoroughly.

Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager is no longer associated with this establishment. Current manager holds a Food Safety Handlers certificate. Food Safety Managers certificate required.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Large single service boxes for sandwich's on the floor in the dry storage.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single service items under unprotected drain lines in cupboard under sink by beverage fridge.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Both the Walk-in freezer and walk-in cooler floors are in need of cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
